name: v1.0.1-beta.11
body:
## What's Changed
* Widget updates by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/27
* Onboarding by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/28
* IOS 26 UI by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/30
* Add app settings and new edit view by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/31
* Fix unit tests by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/32
* feat: add current book tracking with auto-fill and recent books by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/33
* feat: add shuffle deck for browsing quotes as swipeable cards by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/34
* fix: prevent typographic widows and hide system chrome on tap by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/35
* docs: update onboarding screens with latest features by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/36
* feat: tag management and spotlight redesign by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/37
* test: add comprehensive unit tests and fix CI workflow by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/38
* feat: add inline tag picker to add-quote flow by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/39
* feat: camera OCR text capture for quotes by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/40
* feat: first-time onboarding revamp with starter quotes by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/41
* feat: add sharing support and iOS share extension by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/42
* feat: add stats & insights screen with interactive heatmap filtering by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/43
* feat: show note text in quote rows and spotlight view by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/44
* feat: persist draft quotes across sheet dismissals by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/45
* feat: replace tap-to-scan with Live Text photo selection by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/46
* feat: add collections and Live Text camera capture by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/47
* feat: add collect button to SpotlightView by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/48
* style: unify fonts and refine typography across views by @ebrock in https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/pull/49


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ebrock/InkLeaf/compare/v0.4.0-alpha...v1.0.1-beta.11
